headline: Cheiron Raises $8M Seed Led by Menlo Ventures to Build the Operating System for Drug Programs

headline: Fishbone Advisors Survey: Institutional Investors See Healthcare's AI Story as Overblown
summary: CHICAGO, July 22, 2026--Fishbone Advisors, a capital markets intelligence firm, today released a new report showing that healthcare's AI narrative has a credibility problem with institutional investors. In every healthcare subsector, roughly half to two-thirds of investors (48% to 67%) agree that management overemphasizes AI relative to its actual financial contribution, the most consistent finding in "Hallucinating Value: Healthcare's AI Narrative."

headline: Is Moderna (MRNA) Fully Valued As Board Changes And Earnings Near?
summary: Moderna (MRNA) drew fresh attention after appointing experienced financial executive Michael McDonnell to its Board and Audit Committee, as the stock recently declined 3.77% and an earnings report is scheduled for July 31, 2026. See our latest analysis for Moderna. Moderna shares have been volatile, with the 7-day share price return down 11.54% and the 30-day share price return down 6.72%. However, the year to date share price return of 93.32% and 1-year total shareholder return of 82.28%...

headline: Moderna (MRNA) Appoints Michael McDonnell To Board As Committee Roles Shift
summary: Moderna has appointed Michael McDonnell to its Board of Directors and Audit Committee. The company has adjusted certain Board committee memberships alongside his appointment. The changes bring additional financial and life sciences experience into Moderna’s governance structure. Moderna, traded on NasdaqGS:MRNA, is drawing attention for a fresh governance update rather than product news. The stock closed at $59.66, with returns up 93.3% year to date and up 82.3% over the past year, set...
